landing.footer.name: Maklr
landing.hero.subtitle: Estates, contacts, email, documents, calendar, tasks. Everything an agent needs. Nothing they don't. Open source.
landing.hero.title_line2: that gets out of your way
landing.highlights.custom_fields.descrip: Extend any entity with user-defined fields. Per property type, per contact type. Your data model, your way.
landing.highlights.custom_fields.title: Custom fields
landing.highlights.open_source.descripti: Self-host. Audit the code. Contribute. No vendor lock-in, no per-seat pricing, no surprise feature removals.
landing.highlights.open_source.title: Open source
landing.highlights.saved_views.descripti: Filter, sort, save. Build working lists for your daily workflow. Share views across your team.
landing.highlights.saved_views.title: Saved views
landing.modules.activity_log.description: Unified timeline per estate and contact. Auto-logged emails, status changes, uploads. Manual entries for calls and meetings.
landing.modules.activity_log.title: Activity Log
landing.modules.calendar.description: Viewings, meetings, handovers. Link to estates and contacts. Conflict detection. Day, week, and month views.
landing.modules.calendar.title: Calendar
landing.modules.contacts.description: Buyers, sellers, tenants, landlords. Relationship links, qualification pipeline, GDPR consent tracking, duplicate merge.
landing.modules.contacts.title: Contacts
landing.modules.documents.description: File storage per entity. Upload, download, permission checks. Generate PDF brochures from estate data and images.
landing.modules.documents.title: Documents
landing.modules.email.description: Connect via IMAP/SMTP. Send and receive inside Maklr. Auto-match to contacts, auto-archive to activity log. Templates with placeholders.
landing.modules.email.title: Email
landing.modules.estates.description: Full property lifecycle. Apartments, houses, commercial, land. Draft to sold. Map view, image galleries, custom fields.
landing.modules.estates.title: Estates
landing.modules.heading: Everything in one place
landing.modules.matching.description: Search profiles meet active listings. Run a contact against estates or an estate against all profiles. Instant results.
landing.modules.matching.title: Matching
landing.modules.subheading: Nine modules. One system. Zero tab-switching.
landing.modules.tasks.description: Assign, prioritize, track. Link tasks to estates and contacts. List view and kanban board. Nothing falls through.
landing.modules.tasks.title: Tasks
landing.modules.users.description: Role-based access. Admin, manager, agent, readonly. Per-module permissions, record ownership scopes, full audit log.
landing.modules.users.title: Users & Permissions
landing.open_source.description: Maklr is open source. Self-host on your infrastructure, own your data, and extend it however you need. No per-seat fees. No vendor lock-in.
landing.open_source.extensible_desc: Fork it. Extend it. Make it yours.
landing.open_source.heading: Built in the open
landing.open_source.self_host_desc: Your infrastructure, your data, your rules.
